title: Ash Russian Air Force Planes
description: Russian Air Force now dominate your Minecraft skies!
body:
[![AshCraft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a75887d69106ed9eb2dd595176121f279523f184_0.webp)](https://www.ashcraft.cz/)

The AshRusianAirForcePlanes Datapack brings the might of Russian military aviation to your Minecraft skies. This datapack fills your world with iconic aircraft from Russia’s air force legacy.

🛩️ Features:

✔ Flying Russian Military Aircraft – Planes appear high in the sky as detailed structures.
✔ Static Flying Models – Planes are visually in-flight, adding dramatic scenery to your skies.

🌍 Spawn Mechanics:

Russian aircraft are placed during world generation and appear high above the terrain and ocean. You can see them from far away. Works seamlessly in both singleplayer and multiplayer.

⚙️ How to Install:

Go to your Minecraft world folder (.minecraft/saves/Your_World_Name).
Place the datapack file into the datapacks folder.
Launch Minecraft and load your world.
Use /reload in-game to activate the datapack.

That’s it! Your skies now host the powerful and historic aircraft of the Russian Air Force. More jets and bombers are on the way! 🛫🌥️✈️

💬 Want to see a specific aircraft added? Share your ideas on [Discord](https://discord.ashcraft.cz/)!
